notes: D4 probe executed on A1 latents per Tishby IB-pure design memo section 22 op-routable #1. Latents are A1 fine-tuned HNeRV, 600 pairs, latent_dim 28, requantized to uint8 via affine map to [0,255]. Scorer classes are canonical SegNet argmax mode per-pair on A1-rendered frame_1 at (384, 512) using upstream/models/segnet.safetensors loaded via tac.scorer.load_default_scorers. Local macOS CPU; not promotable; diagnostic_cpu evidence grade.
